---
title: "cycle"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=.@"]
---

# cycle

## basic case

```{julia}
# for cycle
for i = 1:2
    println(i) 
end
```

```{julia}
# while cycle
mylist = [1, 2]
myindex = 1
while myindex ≤ length(mylist)
    println(mylist[myindex])
    myindex += 1
end
```

## scope

* We recommend to revise the variables in function when you want to revise them in cycle.

```{julia}
# it may could work but we don't recommend to do this.
a = 1; 
for i = 1:1
    println(a)
    a += 1
    println(a)
end
# define a function to revise the variable in cycle.
function revise_a!(a::Int64)
    for i = 1:1
        println(a)
        a += 1
        println(a)
    end
end
a = 1;
revise_a!(a)
```
